magic_lamp.title: Find or craft a Magic Lamp (As You Wish mod — found in desert structures, pyramids, or rare worldgen)

genie_summon.title: Summon the Genie from the Magic Lamp (As You Wish mod — interact with the lamp to awaken it)

subtitle.text: You have fought demons, gods, and ancient mechanisms. A Genie is, relatively speaking, pleasant company.

description: As You Wish adds the Magic Lamp — an item that contains a Genie.
The lamp is found in desert structure loot (pyramids, desert dungeons).
You may already have one from Ch09 desert chain exploration.
Summoned by interacting with the lamp.
Wishes are limited and may require specific costs or conditions.
You have reached the end of the guided questbook.
You have solved every problem through your own effort.
You are now going to accept a wish from a magical entity.
This is not weakness. This is what you've earned.
The Genie exists. The lamp exists.
Seventeen chapters of work means you get to use it.
→ Find or craft the Magic Lamp [check]
